{{ mod.name }}
{% for icon in mod.icons %}{{ icon.icon }}{% endfor %}
{% for game in mod.games_ordered %}

{{ game }}

{% endfor %}
{% if mod.authors|length <= 1 %}
{% for user in mod.authors %}

{{ user }}

{% endfor %}
{% else %}
{{ _(trans["team"]) }}
{% for user in mod.authors %}

{{ user }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if mod.team|length <= 1 %}
{% for user in mod.team %}

{{ user }}

{% endfor %}
{% else %}
{{ _(trans["team"]) }}
{% for user in mod.team %}

{{ user }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% for url in mod.get_urls() %} {% if url.image %} {% set img = url.image %} {% else %} {{ _(trans["link"]) }} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{{ mod.get_description(mod_id_to_name=mod_id_to_name)|safe }} {% set notes = mod.get_notes(mod_id_to_name=mod_id_to_name) %} {% if notes|length > 0 %}

{% for note in notes %}{{ note|safe }}{% if not loop.last %}
{% endif %}{% endfor %} {% endif %}
